creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
David:

We are sorry it took so long to finally get back to this.
I took a quick look, and portrevision 2 is already in ports tree.

Would you like to take another look at this?

Maybe to better serve the users needs, you could use optionsng to make 
sure the rights options are presented.

(or, just upgrade your ports tree, and see where your patches are still 
needed)

Thanks.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
